page: Microsoft Azure M48bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 24 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8473C processor with an x86_64 architecture. The CPU operates at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz and includes a 105 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, but it is premium storage capable and designed for block storage performance.

Benchmark data indicates strong memory and processing capabilities. The server achieved a Geekbench single-core score of 2183.0 and a multi-core score of 19356.0. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, with read-only small block cached speeds reaching 3826.53 GB/sec and large block uncached write speeds at 94.29 GB/sec. In computational tasks, the processor demonstrates strong performance in bzip3 multi-threaded decompression at 288.94 GB/sec and Passmark database operations at 24056.12. For machine learning workloads, the CPU's Advanced Matrix Extensions support moderate LLM inference speeds, processing 178.59 tokens per second for a medium 7B model prompt.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the M48bs_v3 offers a high-density memory-to-vCPU profile suitable for enterprise workloads without the overhead of local storage disks, relying instead on external block storage. The absence of local NVMe drives and dedicated GPUs represents a tradeoff for workloads requiring high-speed local scratch space or hardware-accelerated graphics. This configuration is optimized for memory-intensive applications, database operations, software compilation, and medium-scale text and image processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure M48bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by a 48-vCPU Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture with Microsoft Hyper-V, it features 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB per core memory allocation. The instance lacks local storage and GPUs but supports premium block storage. Performance benchmarks show strong capabilities, including a Geekbench single-core score of 2183.0 and a multi-core score of 19356.0, alongside high memory bandwidth of 3826.53 GB/sec for cached reads. The processor supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and AMX for accelerated matrix operations. This configuration is highly suited for memory-intensive database operations, enterprise application hosting, software compilation, and medium-scale data processing workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M48bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 48 vCPUs on an Intel Xeon 8473C processor, 384 GB of RAM, and premium block storage support for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M48bs_v3 is a memory-optimized VM with 48 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and advanced instruction sets for database and enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-frequency, memory-optimized virtual machine featuring advanced matrix extensions and dense memory allocation for demanding database and enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor at 4.0 GHz
384.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
Supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX
Designed for premium block storage with no local storage included
Strong performance in database operations and multi-threaded decompression
Best suited for memory-intensive enterprise applications and software compilation
